news.t: First Trust Financials AlphaDEX becomes the largest shareholders of Freedom Holding after Timur Turlov

holdings.infoBox: FXO is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are Affiliated Managers Group stock at 1.87%, T. Rowe Price Group at 1.77%, Jefferies Financial Group at 1.74%, The Hanover Insurance Group at 1.66%, and SEI Investments Company at 1.66%.

overview.description: The First Trust Financials AlphaDEX Fund (FXO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the StrataQuant Financials index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap US financials stocks. The underlying index uses multi-factor selection and tiered equal-weighting. FXO was launched on May 8, 2007 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Financials AlphaDEX becomes the largest shareholders of Freedom Holding after Timur Turlov
data.text: NEW YORK , July 7, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- As part of its scheduled portfolio rebalancing, the First Trust Financials AlphaDEX Fund (NASDAQ: FXO) acquired 185,000 shares of Freedom Holding Corp. (NASDAQ:...

data.title: Invest in banks, strategist says
data.text: Ryan Payne, president of Payne Capital Management, makes the case for why he thinks the banking sector is where investors should put their money.
